units.name: 时态进阶
units.description: 初中阶段重点时态的掌握与运用

knowledge_points.name: 现在完成时
knowledge_points.description: 表示过去发生的动作对现在造成的影响或结果
knowledge_points.formula: 主语 + have/has + 过去分词

knowledge_points.name: 过去进行时
knowledge_points.description: 表示过去某个时间正在进行的动作
knowledge_points.example: I was reading when he came in.

knowledge_points.name: 过去将来时
knowledge_points.description: 表示从过去某时看将要发生的动作
knowledge_points.formula: 主语 + would/should + 动词原形 或 主语 + was/were going to + 动词原形
knowledge_points.example: He said he would come the next day.

knowledge_points.name: 过去完成时
knowledge_points.description: 表示在过去某时间之前已经完成的动作
knowledge_points.formula: 主语 + had + 过去分词
knowledge_points.example: When I got there, the train had left.

units.name: 句型进阶
units.description: 初中阶段重点句型结构

knowledge_points.name: 特殊疑问句
knowledge_points.description: 用疑问词开头的疑问句
knowledge_points.structure: 疑问词 + 一般疑问句语序
knowledge_points.example: What are you doing? Where does he live?

knowledge_points.name: 祈使句
knowledge_points.description: 表示请求、命令、建议等
knowledge_points.example: Open the door. Don't be late. Let's go.

knowledge_points.name: 感叹句
knowledge_points.description: 表示强烈感情的句子
knowledge_points.structure: What + (a/an) + 形容词 + 名词 + 主谓! / How + 形容词/副词 + 主谓!
knowledge_points.example: What a beautiful day! How fast he runs!

knowledge_points.name: 宾语从句
knowledge_points.description: 在句中作宾语的从句
knowledge_points.structure: 主句 + 引导词 + 从句（陈述语序）
knowledge_points.example: I know that he is a teacher. I wonder if he will come.

units.name: 词类进阶
units.description: 初中阶段重点词类用法

knowledge_points.name: 物主代词
knowledge_points.description: 表示所有关系的代词
knowledge_points.example: This is my book. This book is mine.
common_errors: 形容词性与名词性混淆

knowledge_points.name: 情态动词
knowledge_points.description: 表示说话人的语气和态度
knowledge_points.example: I can swim. You must finish it. You should study hard.

knowledge_points.name: 不定代词
knowledge_points.description: 不指明代替任何特定名词的代词
knowledge_points.example: I have some books. Do you have any books?

knowledge_points.name: 介词
knowledge_points.description: 表示词与词之间关系的词
knowledge_points.example: at 8 o'clock, on Monday, in 2024, in the box

units.name: 阅读理解进阶
units.description: 初中英语阅读理解技巧

knowledge_points.name: 主旨大意题
knowledge_points.description: 理解文章或段落的主旨大意
knowledge_points.method: 找主题句、归纳段落大意、分析标题

knowledge_points.name: 推理判断题
knowledge_points.description: 根据文章内容进行合理推断
knowledge_points.method: 基于文本、合理推断、排除干扰项

knowledge_points.name: 词义猜测题
knowledge_points.description: 根据上下文猜测生词含义
knowledge_points.method: 利用定义、举例、对比、构词法、上下文逻辑

knowledge_points.name: 任务型阅读
knowledge_points.description: 根据文章内容完成表格或回答问题

knowledge_points.name: 书面表达
knowledge_points.description: 根据提示写短文

knowledge_points.name: 应用文写作
knowledge_points.description: 写书信、邮件、通知等应用文
knowledge_points.structure: 格式 + 内容 + 语言

knowledge_points.name: 句式变换
knowledge_points.description: 使用多种句式使文章生动

knowledge_points.name: 写作润色
knowledge_points.description: 修改和润色文章
